title: Calendar no option to view more than 4 items on same day
excerpt:
Sometimes we have more items due on same day, but the calendar only can view 4 items max and the exceeding item are not able to scroll down or expand to view.

posts.author: Wildman (KC Low)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sometimes we have more items due on same day, but the calendar only can view 4 items max and the exceeding item are not able to scroll down or expand to view.
can you make it like google calendar have [more] option underneath if we have more than 4 items on same day?
